mapper.sql: id, user_id, date, time, amount, description, mode, refund_status, refunded_amount, is_deleted, created_at
mapper.select: SELECT FROM `transaction` WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY date DESC, time DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT DISTINCT t. FROM `transaction` t LEFT JOIN entry e ON t.id = e.transaction_id WHERE t.user_id = #{userId} AND t.is_deleted = 0
ORDER BY
t.amount
t.created_at
t.date
ASC
DESC
, t.time DESC LIMIT #{query.pageSize} OFFSET #{query.offset}
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT t.id) FROM `transaction` t LEFT JOIN entry e ON t.id = e.transaction_id WHERE t.user_id = #{userId} AND t.is_deleted = 0

sql.if:
AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM entry e4 WHERE e4.transaction_id = t.id AND e4.account_type = 'category'
AND e4.debit IS NOT NULL AND e4.debit > 0
AND e4.credit IS NOT NULL AND e4.credit > 0
)

mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT t.id) FROM `transaction` t INNER JOIN entry e ON t.id = e.transaction_id WHERE e.account_id = #{categoryId} AND e.account_type = 'category' AND t.is_deleted = 0
